inputs.label: Temperature in Rømer
inputs.businessContext: Measured temperature in the Rømer scale, typically from a calibrated thermometer.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured temperature in the Rømer scale, typically from a calibrated thermometer.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Genellikle kalibre edilmiş bir termometreden alınan Rømer ölçeğinde ölçülen sıcaklık.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gemessene Temperatur in der Rømer-Skala, typischerweise von einem kalibrierten Thermometer.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température mesurée sur l'échelle Rømer, généralement à partir d'un thermomètre calibré.

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the displayed Celsius result.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for the displayed Celsius result.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Görüntülenen Celsius sonucu için ondalık basamak sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für das angezeigte Celsius-Ergebnis.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour le résultat affiché en Celsius.

inputs.label: Calibration Offset
inputs.businessContext: Offset to compensate for known systematic error of the measuring instrument.

businessContext_i18n.en: Offset to compensate for known systematic error of the measuring instrument.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ölçüm cihazının bilinen sistematik hatasını telafi etmek için ofset.
businessContext_i18n.de: Offset zur Kompensation eines bekannten systematischen Fehlers des Messgeräts.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Décalage pour compenser l'erreur systématique connue de l'instrument de mesure.

inputs.label: Measurement Uncertainty
inputs.businessContext: Standard uncertainty (k=1) of the Rømer measurement, per ISO/IEC 17025.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard uncertainty (k=1) of the Rømer measurement, per ISO/IEC 17025.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ISO/IEC 17025'e göre Rømer ölçümünün standart belirsizliği (k=1).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Incertitude-type (k=1) de la mesure Rømer, selon ISO/CEI 17025.

inputs.label: Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level for expanded uncertainty (typically 95% for coverage factor k=2).

businessContext_i18n.en: Confidence level for expanded uncertainty (typically 95% for coverage factor k=2).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Genişletilmiş belirsizlik için güven düzeyi (kapsam faktörü k=2 için tipik olarak %95).
businessContext_i18n.de: Konfidenzniveau für die erweiterte Unsicherheit (typischerweise 95 % für Erweiterungsfaktor k=2).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Niveau de confiance pour l'incertitude élargie (généralement 95 % pour un facteur d'élargissement k=2).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
